title: Cronos Group Reports 2026 First Quarter Results
text: Cronos Group reported record Q1 2026 net revenue and gross profit, with management highlighting growth in Israel, gains for Spinach brand in Canada and continued international expansion. Consolidated net revenue totaled $45.2 million, up 40% year over year. Gross profit rose to $19.2 million with 39% increase. Net income jumped to $15.7 million with 103% increase. Adjusted EBITDA improved to $5.1 million from $2.3 million. Cash and equivalents reached $821.9 million with total assets of $1.172 billion, reflecting strong liquidity position as industry-leading. Canada revenue was $25.4 million with 26% growth. Israel revenue reached $14.2 million with 53% growth. Other countries generated $5.7 million revenue with 97% growth. Spinach claimed number one position in Canadian vapes for first time and maintained number one ranking in edibles with 20.8% market share. PEACE NATURALS achieved ninth consecutive quarter of record revenue in Israel. Lord Jones expanded into Israeli medical cannabis market. Company authorized new $50 million share repurchase program.
